arts.ttl: Simone Inzaghi tipped to succeed Pep Guardiola at Man City
arts.sum: Mazzola believes he could be the man City replace Pep with, even if the Inter legend from the 1960s and 70s hopes Inzaghi stays at San Siro. Italy and Inter Milan legend Sandro Mazzola has tipped Simone Inzaghi to succeed Pep Guardiola as the next manager of Manchester City .

arts.ttl: Man United 'locked in five-way transfer battle' for Crystal Palace superstar
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly locked in a five-team battle for Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta, who has excelled for the Eagles this term.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne to skipper City in his final Manchester derby
arts.sum: De Bruyne comes into the Starting XI alongside Mateo Kovacic, Bernardo Silva and Phil Foden with Nico, Savinho, Jack Grealish and Jeremy Doku dropping to the bench for the 16:30 (UK) kick-off in front of live Sky Sports cameras. Kevin De Bruyne skippers City in his final Manchester derby as Pep Guardiola makes four changes to his team for the trip to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'keeping an eye' on Lamine Yamal situation, but would Barcelona really let him leave?
arts.sum: Manchester City and Liverpool are reportedly both keeping a close eye on Lamine Yamal's situation at Barcelona in the event that the 17-year-old becomes available.
